title: resume-site Configuration
description: JSON Schema for config.yaml — infrastructure settings only.

secret_key.description: Flask secret key for sessions and CSRF. Must be at least 32 characters for production.

database_path.description: Path to the SQLite database file.

max_upload_size.description: Maximum file upload size in bytes (default 10 MB).

session_timeout_minutes.description: Admin session inactivity timeout in minutes.

session_cookie_secure.description: Set the Secure flag on the session cookie (HTTPS-only). Disable for plain-HTTP local development.

password_file.description: Path to file containing SMTP password (Docker/Podman secrets).

recipient.description: Email address for contact form submissions.

allowed_networks.description: CIDR ranges allowed to access admin routes.
